messages.subject: [R-sig-dyn-mod] ODE-deSolve questions
messages.body_plain:
Good afternoon,

I am trying to simulate a large models with deSolve (ODE). My model result
in errors and stop simulation:

DLSODA-  At T (=R1) and step size H (=R2), the
      corrector convergence failed repeatedly
      or with ABS(H) = HMIN
In above message, R1 = 0, R2 = 3.80898e-09

Error in x.estrela.novo[500, ] : ?ndice fora de limites
Al?m disso: Warning messages:
1: In slo() : partes imagin?rias descartadas na coer??o
2: In lsoda(y, times, func, parms, ...) :
  repeated convergence test failures on a step, but integration was
successful - inaccurate Jacobian matrix?
3: In lsoda(y, times, func, parms, ...) :
  Returning early. Results are accurate, as far as they go

I read the papers of the packages, and i tried different methods, but the
errors ans warning are maintained.


Do you have any suggestions for these kinds of errors?

Thank you so much.



Thank you for your attention!!

Viviana M?rquez Vel?squez

Doutoranda em Ci?ncias Biol?gicas - Zoologia

M.Sc. Ciencias Biol?gicas - Zoolog?a

Departamento de Sistem?tica e Ecologia, Centro de Ci?ncias Exatas e da
Natureza,

Universidade Federal da Para?ba, Jo?o Pessoa, PB, Brazil

	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
